---
title: "BRANCH Demographics Summary"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(stringr)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

BRANCH_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH$BRANCH, "BRANCH_cleaned.rds"))

progression_status <- BRANCH_dat$diagnosis_latest %>%
  select(PIDN, progression_group, latest_diagnosis = clin_syn_best_est)
```

```{r}
table1_gtsummary <- BRANCH_dat$demographics %>%
  left_join(progression_status %>% select(PIDN, progression_group), by = "PIDN") %>%
  left_join(BRANCH_dat$APOE %>% select(PIDN, apoe), by = "PIDN") %>%
  mutate(
    progression_group = if_else(is.na(progression_group), "CN", as.character(progression_group)),
    progression_group = factor(progression_group, levels = c("CN", "SCD", "MCI", "Dementia", "Other"))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Education_level = case_when(
      educ <= 12 ~ "High school or less (≤12 years)",
      educ > 12 & educ <= 16 ~ "Some college (13-16 years)",
      educ > 16 ~ "Postgraduate",
      TRUE ~ NA
      ) %>% factor(levels = c("High school or less (≤12 years)",
                              "Some college (13-16 years)",
                              "Postgraduate"))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-PIDN, -UnQID, -baselineDate, -dob) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = progression_group,
    label = list(
      age_at_DCDate = "Age (at baseline)",
      gender = "Sex",
      educ = "Education (years)",
      Education_level = "Education (level)",
      apoe = "APOE category"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**Progression Status**") %>%
  modify_footnote(all_stat_cols() ~ "Mean (SD) for continuous; n (%) for categorical") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  italicize_levels() %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")
    ),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  )
table1_gtsummary

# gtsave(table1_gtsummary, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "BRANCH_demographics.png"))
```

# Biomarkers
## Data availability table
```{r}
# Combine biomarker data
janssen_long <- BRANCH_dat$janssen %>%
  select(PIDN, DCDate, gfap_janssen, nfl_janssen, ptau217_janssen) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(gfap_janssen, nfl_janssen, ptau217_janssen),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "value"
  )

quanterix_long <- BRANCH_dat$quanterix %>%
  select(PIDN, DCDate, ab40, ab42, gfap, nfl, ptau181, ab_ratio) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ab40, ab42, gfap, nfl, ptau181, ab_ratio),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "value"
  )

biomarkers_combined <- bind_rows(janssen_long, quanterix_long)

table2_gtsummary <- biomarkers_combined %>%
  group_by(PIDN, biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    has_data = any(!is.na(value)),
    has_2plus = sum(!is.na(value)) >= 2,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    `≥1 Measurement` = sum(has_data),
    `≥2 Measurements` = sum(has_2plus),
    total_n = n_distinct(PIDN),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `≥1 Measurement` = paste0(`≥1 Measurement`, " (", round(`≥1 Measurement`/total_n*100, 1), "%)"),
    `≥2 Measurements` = paste0(`≥2 Measurements`, " (", round(`≥2 Measurements`/total_n*100, 1), "%)")
  ) %>%
  select(-total_n) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    biomarker = md("**Biomarker**"),
    `≥1 Measurement` = md("**≥1 Measurement**"),
    `≥2 Measurements` = md("**≥2 Measurements**")
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Number and percentage of participants with specified number of measurements",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(`≥1 Measurement`, `≥2 Measurements`))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(style = "italic")),
    locations = cells_body(columns = biomarker)
  )

table2_gtsummary
# gtsave(table2_gtsummary, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "BRANCH_BBM_dataavail.png"))
```

## Biomarker summary statistics
```{r}
# Calculate mean biomarker values per person
janssen_means <- BRANCH_dat$janssen %>%
  group_by(PIDN) %>%
  summarise(
    gfap_janssen_mean = mean(gfap_janssen, na.rm = TRUE),
    nfl_janssen_mean = mean(nfl_janssen, na.rm = TRUE),
    ptau217_janssen_mean = mean(ptau217_janssen, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

quanterix_means <- BRANCH_dat$quanterix %>%
  group_by(PIDN) %>%
  summarise(
    ab_ratio_mean = mean(ab_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    gfap_quanterix_mean = mean(gfap, na.rm = TRUE),
    nfl_quanterix_mean = mean(nfl, na.rm = TRUE),
    ptau181_mean = mean(ptau181, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

biomarker_table1 <- janssen_means %>%
  full_join(quanterix_means, by = "PIDN") %>%
  left_join(progression_status %>% select(PIDN, progression_group), by = "PIDN") %>%
  mutate(
    progression_group = if_else(is.na(progression_group), "CN", as.character(progression_group)),
    progression_group = factor(progression_group, levels = c("CN", "SCD", "MCI", "Dementia", "Other"))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-PIDN) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = progression_group,
    missing = "no",
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd}) [{min}-{max}]",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"
    ),
    label = list(
      ab_ratio_mean = "Aβ42/Aβ40 (Quanterix)",
      gfap_janssen_mean = "GFAP (pg/mL, Janssen)",
      gfap_quanterix_mean = "GFAP (pg/mL, Quanterix)",
      nfl_janssen_mean = "NfL (pg/mL, Janssen)",
      nfl_quanterix_mean = "NfL (pg/mL, Quanterix)",
      ptau181_mean = "p-tau 181 (pg/mL)",
      ptau217_janssen_mean = "p-tau 217 (pg/mL)"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**Progression Status**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  as_gt()
biomarker_table1
# gtsave(biomarker_table1, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "BRANCH_BBM_mean.png"))
```
